steps.title: Form a direct question
steps.content: The sentence begins with "Where," so the blank must complete a direct question. Standard English direct questions use subject-auxiliary inversion, placing "did" before "the word 'chortle,'" and end with a question mark.

steps.title: Check order and punctuation
steps.content: Choice A has correct word order but ends with a period. Choice B has a question mark but lacks inversion. Choice D lacks both the auxiliary and the question mark. The only version with inversion and a question mark is correct. The answer is C.
